8:["$","p",null,{"children":["All benchmarks run on a single core, SQLite with ",["$","code",null,{"children":"sqlite-vec"}],":"]}]
9:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Metric"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"1K Entries"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"10K Entries"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"100K Entries"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Write"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"12ms"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"15ms"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"18ms"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Vector search"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"15ms"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"35ms"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"85ms"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Hybrid search"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"45ms"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"65ms"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"150ms"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"FTS5 search"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"5ms"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"8ms"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"20ms"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Consolidation"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"2s"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"5s"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"25s"}]]}]]}]]}]
a:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Optimization Strategies"}]
b:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"1. Batch Writes"}]
c:["$","$L21",null,{"code":"# Bad: Individual writes (separate transactions)\nfor item in items:\n  mem.remember(item)\n\n# Good: Batch via remember_batch\nmem.beam.remember_batch([\n  {\"content\": item, \"source\": \"batch\", \"importance\": 0.5}\n  for item in items\n])\n","language":"python"}]
d:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"2. Enable WAL Mode"}]
e:["$","p",null,{"children":"SQLite WAL mode improves concurrent read/write performance. Enable it manually on your database file:"}]
f:["$","$L21",null,{"code":"sqlite3 ~/.hermes/mnemosyne/data/mnemosyne.db \"PRAGMA journal_mode=WAL;\"\n","language":"bash"}]
10:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"3. Embedding Caching"}]
11:["$","p",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne automatically caches embedding queries via LRU cache (512 entries). Repeated queries in agent loops are near-instant. No configuration needed."}]
12:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"4. Working Memory Limits"}]
13:["$","p",null,{"children":"Keep Working Memory lean. The default maximum is 10,000 entries, controlled via environment variable:"}]
14:["$","$L21",null,{"code":"export MNEMOSYNE_WM_MAX_ITEMS=5000  # Lower limit for faster queries\nexport MNEMOSYNE_WM_TTL_HOURS=12    # Shorter TTL for more aggressive eviction\n","language":"bash"}]
15:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"5. Regular Consolidation"}]
16:["$","p",null,{"children":"Run consolidation periodically to promote working memories to episodic and maintain query performance:"}]
17:["$","$L21",null,{"code":"# Standalone CLI\nmnemosyne sleep\n\n# Or programmatically\nmem.sleep()\n","language":"python"}]
18:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Memory Usage"}]
19:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Component"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Per Entry"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"10K Entries"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Working Memory"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"48 bytes"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"~480KB"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Episodic Memory"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"~2KB"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"~20MB"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Vector Index"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"~6KB"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"~60MB"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"FTS5 Index"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"~2KB"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"~20MB"}]]}]]}]]}]
1a:["$","div",null,{"className":"callout callout-success","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-start gap-3","children":[["$","$L22",null,{"ref":"$undefined","iconNode":[["path",{"d":"M21.801 10A10 10 0 1 1 17 3.335","key":"yps3ct"}],["path",{"d":"m9 11 3 3L22 4","key":"1pflzl"}]],"className":"lucide-circle-check-big shrink-0 mt-0.5","size":18}],["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"className":"block mb-1","children":"SSD Recommended"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"text-sm leading-relaxed","children":["$","p",null,{"children":"SQLite performance is heavily I/O bound.
